customAttributes.description:
Inked

Flash
Flying
When this creature enters, draw a card.
This creature has deathtouch as long as you control at least three other snow permanents.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Chaos Vault: Inked and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 5/15/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
